hypothesis: If a generative LLM agent is augmented with structured tool-use (short-/long-term memory, periodic table, and knowledge base) and coupled to a diffusion crystal-structure generator and a learned property evaluator in an iterative loop, then it will outperform tool-free LLMs and diffusion-only baselines in producing valid, unique, and novel inorganic materials that meet specified formation-energy targets (±0.25 eV/atom), because tool-informed reasoning and feedback steer proposals toward energetically plausible compositions and structures.
